title: Arrest Made in January Homicide on Central Avenue
summary: A suspect has been arrested in connection with the fatal shooting of Ludvin Guzman Morales on January 24.
charlotte_impact: Brings closure to a tragic case and highlights ongoing efforts to address violent crime in the east Charlotte area.

title: Ancient Bones Discovered During Home Renovation in Columbia
summary: Human bones, potentially hundreds of years old, were found during a home renovation project in Columbia, SC.
charlotte_impact: Highlights historical aspects of the region and prompts further investigation into the area's past.

title: Cooler Temperatures Expected Before Another Warm-Up
summary: Charlotte will experience cooler temperatures before a hot streak returns, with Friday potentially breaking records.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast update, informing residents about upcoming temperature changes.

title: Woman Found Safe After Kidnapping in Cheraw; Suspect Still At-Large
summary: A woman was found safe after being kidnapped in Cheraw. The suspect is still at large, and the public is warned not to approach.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about public safety and the importance of reporting suspicious activity to authorities.

title: Suspect Arrested in Fatal Hit-and-Run on The Plaza
summary: Thomas Haynes was arrested after a hit-and-run on The Plaza resulted in the death of a 23-year-old woman and injuries to two others.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a tragic incident and emphasizes the consequences of reckless driving and hit-and-run offenses.

title: CMS to Outline Proposed Fiscal Year 2026-27 Budget

title: One Person Injured in Pineville Apartment Fire

charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of fire safety and emergency response in the community.
